message:
feat(onboard-state): Add locking and comprehensive tests

Locking improvements:
- Wrap markSessionProcessed() in withLock() to prevent concurrent
  session marking from corrupting state
- Wrap resetOnboardState() in withLock() for atomic state reset

New test coverage (22 tests):
- createEmptyState: structure validation, ISO8601 timestamps
- loadOnboardState: missing file, valid file, invalid JSON, schema
  validation failure, version mismatch handling
- saveOnboardState: disk persistence, stats recomputation, timestamp
  update
- isSessionProcessed: positive/negative cases, path normalization
- markSessionProcessed: new sessions, idempotent updates, skipped flag
- resetOnboardState: clears all progress
- getOnboardProgress: hasStarted flag, summary stats
- filterUnprocessedSessions: filters correctly, edge cases

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
